meaning: n.[日] 空手道(日本的一种徒手自卫武术)
examples: He holds a black belt in karate.
The karate bout has many similarities to a boxing match.
Being a combat sport, karate carries with it the risk of injury.
He introduced me to the crowd as a great karate master, an accolade I didn't merit.
She has a purple belt in karate and is now taking taekwondo in school.
